# backend/pipeline/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:41Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/pipeline/* — manual + automatic process modes.

MANUAL mode  · discrete user-driven steps · NO pipeline structure.
              User invokes each action separately · controls every
              hyperparameter · stops at any step.

AUTOMATIC mode · pipeline-based execution · phases run sequentially ·
                  each phase produces output + quality_score + report.

Per §57.7 honest: scaffold-mode responses when sklearn/MLflow not
fully wired. Real metrics arrive when the eval harness lands.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import math
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import uuid
- from `datetime` import datetime, timezone
- from `typing` import Any, Optional
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException
- from `pydantic` import BaseModel, Field

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `ManualStartRequest`: (no docstring)
- `ManualLoadDataRequest`: (no docstring)
- `ManualSplitRequest`: (no docstring)
- `ManualSelectModelRequest`: (no docstring)
- `ManualHyperparamsRequest`: (no docstring)
- `AutoRunRequest`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `_empty_component()`: Per §93 · every component has 4 sub-sections: Input · Process · Output · Visualization.
- `_new_manual_state(process_id, dataset)`: (no docstring)
- `_set_component(state, component, section, content)`: Per §93 · update component.{Input|Process|Output|Visualization}.content + status.
- `manual_start(body)`: Begin a manual session · returns session_id · NO auto-pipeline.
- `manual_get_state(session_id)`: (no docstring)
- `manual_load_data(session_id, body)`: Step 1 · operator loads data · sees row + feature counts.
- `manual_split_data(session_id, body)`: Step 2 · operator chooses train/val/test ratios.
- `manual_select_model(session_id, body)`: Step 3 · operator picks ONE or MULTIPLE models.
- `manual_set_hyperparams(session_id, body)`: Step 4 · operator sets/changes hyperparameters · sigmoid temp · etc.
- `manual_train(session_id)`: Step 5 · operator triggers training (one click per model selected).
- `manual_inspect_errors(session_id)`: Step 6 · operator inspects errors · summary per model.
- `manual_visualize(session_id)`: Step 7 · operator generates visualization (confusion matrix · ROC · etc.).
- `manual_generate_report(session_id)`: Step 8 · operator generates a report from current state.
- `_new_auto_run(process_id)`: (no docstring)
- `auto_run(body)`: Start an automatic pipeline run · executes all phases sequentially.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- ─── In-process state (operator dev convenience · prod would be Redis/DB) ───
- ─── MANUAL MODE · discrete user-driven steps · NO pipeline ────────
- Per §93 · 4 canonical components · each with 4 sub-sections (IPO+V)
- Discrete state slots · user fills each separately (legacy + active)
- No pipeline graph here · operator advances ad-hoc
